codeReview.summary: Custom theme implementation is complete and meets all requirements. Created docs/.vitepress/theme/custom.css with Shellport dark branding (#0c0c0f background, #a78bfa purple accent). Updated theme/index.ts to import custom CSS. Added edit-on-GitHub links to config.ts. Logo integration was already present via existing config.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker used path '/logo.png' in config.ts for logo instead of '/shellport/logo.png'. VitePress handles this correctly by resolving relative to base, but AGENTS.md guidance is ambiguous about whether absolute paths in config auto-resolve with base or need explicit base prefix.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: config.ts line 12: logo: '/logo.png' — AGENTS.md says to copy logo.png to docs/public/logo.png but doesn't clarify path resolution for config assets

summary: Feature implementation is complete and passes review. The custom theme CSS properly applies dark background (#0c0c0f) and purple accent colors (#a78bfa) via CSS custom properties. Edit-on-GitHub links are configured correctly in config.ts. Logo appears in header via existing logo config and in hero section via index.md hero.image.src. Build verification (bun run docs:build) succeeded with exit code 0. No blocking issues found.
